body:
A special update for you on the state of the 2018 race. Peek inside for the latest on where we're at in these GOP-held battleground states. Then, help us flip these seats >>
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20180411-Battleground_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team -- here's a rundown on three GOP-held battleground states:
* **Nevada:** Jacky Rosen (D) is leading Dean Heller (R) by just ONE-POINT in the polls and now Mike Pence (and Donald Trump) are swooping in to bail out Heller.

* **Texas:** Beto O'Rourke (D) just unveiled record-breaking fundraising that's made Ted Cruz NERVOUS. And he should be -- Beto's already polling within single-digits of Cruz!

* **Arizona:** Kyrsten Sinema's (D) going hard at what _CNN_ named the "Senate seat most likely to flip in 2018" \-- meanwhile Joe Arpaio (R) is telling Trump voters he'll re-launch the investigation in Obama's birth certificate.

**If we can flip just two of these seats, we can flip the Senate.** But Republicans are doing everything in their power to hold onto these seats...and we're going to need an outpouring of grassroots support to get the job done.

[**Pitch in $1 now to support battleground Democratic Senate candidates and all our efforts to beat Republicans across the country >>**](http://action.dscc. We are thrilled to have three incredibly strong candidates in the race for these GOP-held Senate seats.

But here's the thing: Having great candidates means nothing if they don't have the resources they need to compete against well-financed Republicans come Election Day.

And with poll numbers like these, you can bet that the GOP's dark money donors are going to try to quietly swoop in and buy this election for Mitch McConnell.

We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5dc7/24c69fd9/1dd039914/188b46e2/2551611254/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEP25N_digital_email_20180411_AprilSpecialElections_inact&source=WQEFEP25N_digital_email_20180411_AprilSpecialElections_inact")

Peter,

We have two special elections left this month!

We're supporting two pro-choice Democratic women on the ballot on April 24th:
* Shelley Mayer for New York's 37th state Senate District
* Hiral Tipirneni for Arizona's 8th Congressional District

Both of these races are critical to control of their respective chambers and showing Democrats have the momentum to win this year.

**[Donate $3 to help Shelley and Hiral and all of our candidates win their elections this month and beyond.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5dc7/24c69fd9/1dd039914/188b46e3/2551611254/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180411_email_AprilSpecialElections?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+Shelley+and+Hiral+and+a&utm_campaign=WQEFEP25N_digital_email_20180411_AprilSpecialElections_inact&source=WQEFEP25N_digital_email_20180411_AprilSpecialElections_inact")**

In New York, Shelley is running to fill an open state Senate seat in a suburban swing district where we can't take anything for granted. The outcome of this race could affect party control of the state Senate.

And in Arizona, we're supporting first-time candidate and former emergency room physician, Hiral Tipirneni. She's running to replace a Republican who resigned after allegations he asked his staff to be surrogate mothers. Flipping this seat gets us one step closer to flipping the entire House.

Both Shelley and Hiral need our help to win these close contests in just 13 days.

**Donate $3 to help elect our pro-choice Democratic women with elections this month and all the way through November:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Win-April-Special-Elections](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5dc7/24c69fd9/1dd039914/188b411c/2551611254/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180411_email_AprilSpecialElections?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgWinAprilSpecialE&utm_campaign=WQEFEP25N_digital_email_20180411_AprilSpecialElections_inact&source=WQEFEP25N_digital_email_20180411_AprilSpecialElections_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

name: The White House
subject: The scourge of sex trafficking in America
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=99463d91648a76d14271a660546f5b5f526f2fc93d2e1e90d54567239dc8ef866d5ea086e6e3b90bafa17ae259bb782a4ceb85aecd0d3691) The White House • April 12, 2018
## Driving the Day
| • | At 1:45 p.m. ET in the Rose Garden, President Donald J. Trump will announce new survey results showing historic confidence from U.S. manufacturers after tax reform. [Watch live.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=99463d91648a76d1fd23585bc911beff764a51c38200a3ab454776a970c4699f331adfa64024a45edbcddd1d7e500feeb137fb55617c6ee4)
---|---
• | Elected leaders from rural America are joining the President this morning to discuss how better trade deals can protect American farmers and open foreign markets.

---
|

## The scourge of sex trafficking in America
**Human sex trafficking is an epidemic**. According to the International Labor Organization, there may be nearly 25 million victims of forced labor across the world. That plight isn’t confined to developing countries: Since 2007, the National Human Trafficking Hotline has received reports of 22,191 sex trafficking cases in the United States.
**The Trump Administration is taking the fight to human traffickers**. Shortly after taking office, President Trump signed Executive Order 13773, “Enforcing Federal Law with Respect to Transnational Criminal Organizations and Preventing International Trafficking,” to boost the government’s response. Last month, Ivanka Trump led a bipartisan roundtable at the White House to discuss pending legislation.
**Yesterday, President Trump took further action**. The President signed the Allow States and Victims to Fight Online Sex Trafficking Act of 2017 (FOSTA), which gives both law enforcement officials and victims new tools to fight sex trafficking. Among these tools, FOSTA makes it easier to seek legal action against any websites that enable these crimes.
[ Learn more about this new law to fight sex trafficking in the United States. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=99463d91648a76d1a1716c6085f766fc08f9dea721c50d60a057d12b5c0fb7de9c310aa7d0e919c46e40ae3407acd4c4c013c8ee206ca5b6)

---
|

## A memorial just steps from the White House
**Each day, 116 Americans die from an opioids overdose.** In addition to “hard drugs” such as heroin and illicitly manufactured fentanyl, opioids include a range of prescription medications that roughly a quarter of patients reportedly misuse in some way.
**President Trump wants the Nation to hear these victims’ stories.** Beginning today, for one week, the engravings of 22,000 people who died from prescription opioid addiction in 2015 will be on exhibit as part of a temporary memorial just outside the White House. The project, led by the nonprofit National Safety Council, is intended to show Americans the depth and human toll of the crisis.
The memorial is free and open to the public from 9 a.m. to 7 p.m. daily.

Trump will announce new survey results showing historic confidence from U.S. manufacturers after tax reform. ---|--- • | Elected leaders from rural America are joining the President this morning to discuss how better trade deals can protect American farmers and open foreign markets. | The scourge of sex trafficking in America Human sex trafficking is an epidemic. According to the International Labor Organization, there may be nearly 25 million victims of forced labor across the world. That plight isn’t confined to developing countries: Since 2007, the National Human Trafficking Hotline has received reports of 22,191 sex trafficking cases in the United States. The Trump Administration is taking the fight to human traffickers. Shortly after taking office, President Trump signed Executive Order 13773, “Enforcing Federal Law with Respect to Transnational Criminal Organizations and Preventing International Trafficking,” to boost the government’s response. Last month, Ivanka Trump led a bipartisan roundtable at the White House to discuss pending legislation. Yesterday, President Trump took further action. The President signed the Allow States and Victims to Fight Online Sex Trafficking Act of 2017 (FOSTA), which gives both law enforcement officials and victims new tools to fight sex trafficking. Among these tools, FOSTA makes it easier to seek legal action against any websites that enable these crimes. | A memorial just steps from the White House Each day, 116 Americans die from an opioids overdose. In addition to “hard drugs” such as heroin and illicitly manufactured fentanyl, opioids include a range of prescription medications that roughly a quarter of patients reportedly misuse in some way. President Trump wants the Nation to hear these victims’ stories. Beginning today, for one week, the engravings of 22,000 people who died from prescription opioid addiction in 2015 will be on exhibit as part of a temporary memorial just outside the White House. The project, led by the nonprofit National Safety Council, is intended to show Americans the depth and human toll of the crisis. The memorial is free and open to the public from 9 a.m. to 7 p.m. daily. Interested in visiting? | Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead President Donald J. Trump signs H.R. 1865, the Allow States and Victims to Fight Online Sex Trafficking Act | |

body:
If we organize across the country just like we organized in PA-18, Democrats will take back the House this year.
---
Today I am in Washington, D.C. to be sworn in as the newest Democratic member of the House of Representatives.

More than 14,000 DNC supporters made a donation directly to my campaign -- and I can't tell you how critical that was in helping bring home a win in PA-18.

Republicans poured $10 million into my district to try and beat me -- and you can bet they're ready to spend massive amounts of money to try to take out other Democrats this year. name: Dan Lipinski
subject: Trump, just stop.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/KzLdgPifJBvj1WxIiSAqwG0yggFgq1jCoV-1rt_wDHY=/f9R3juemYqvOekry8ah6twYPiZkJ_lM-Iic51nMO0Y0=)

Peter,

I have fought for Illinois workers for my entire career, and in Congress I pushed back against trade deals that came at the expense of our state's workers.

I support holding the Chinese government accountable for their pattern of violating trade rules and refusing to uphold their end of the bargain. What I do not support is Trump lashing out with tariffs that hurt American consumers, or target our allies and nations that play by the rules.

[**America is built on fair trade and working with our allies. We need to continue to be the world 's leader in this area, and use our influence to bring nations like China into line. Will you stand with me and call on Congress to protect America's trade relationships overseas?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/KzLdgPifJBvj1WxIiSAqwG0yggFgq1jCoV-1rt_wDHY=/K-sPhfS53Kx-pnXU7VznuuGukkiVlURN5tG8gTPGIh4=?recipientId=3sRleyVCGuRfCtuAizxFV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Trump has a habit of making spur-of-the-moment decisions and ignoring the consequences. I don't care too much when it's his business on the line, but when it's Illinois' workers, Illinois' jobs, and Illinois' economy at stake, he needs to think before he attacks.

Workers here have been burned by trade before. It's time that we learned from our lessons and fought for fair trade that boosts American manufacturing and works for everyone.

[**So let 's make sure Congress keeps Trump in line. Sign on to support taking action against China while also telling Trump "No" on throwing tariffs on our allies.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/KzLdgPifJBvj1WxIiSAqwG0yggFgq1jCoV-1rt_wDHY=/K-sPhfS53Kx-pnXU7VznuuGukkiVlURN5tG8gTPGIh4=?recipientId=3sRleyVCGuRfCtuAizxFV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

It's important to show that Illinois is watching. Thanks for adding your voice.

\- Dan

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

| | Hey there -- it's Mike writing again. Sorry to bug you twice in two days, but I have an important request to make. Here it goes.

Throughout my travels to every corner of our state, the one thing Hoosiers know is that **the candidate who can get the most early and consistent support tends to end up in a better position on Election Day.**

Indiana needs that candidate to be Joe Donnelly -- so today, **I 'm asking you to become an Official Bedrock Donor of our campaign by signing up to make a monthly donation.** | **_Team Donnelly 's Official Bedrock Donors:_**
...
Jessica L, Fort Wayne
Aaron B, Bloomington
**Peter**
...

---
**[Donate $25 monthly>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2020/7377f838/3e1f275e/51fabdb2/1898318595/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-bedrockdonor?recurring=true&refcode=20180412.1nd&amount=25")**
**[Donate $50 monthly>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2020/7377f838/3e1f275e/51fabdad/1898318595/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-bedrockdonor?recurring=true&refcode=20180412.1nd&amount=50")**

We deeply appreciate all of our supporters, but Bedrock Donors are folks who go the extra mile. They're the folks who recognize how important this race is to Indiana's future and make a commitment to see it through to the end.

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Will hate win if we stay silent on this issue
body:
Peter,
You may have seen my tweet, “Hate wins.” I sent that tweet when I resigned from my position with the CMA Foundation, less than 24 hours after I joined.
I resigned after a torrent of irrational vitriol was directed at me for my religious and political views. I did so to mitigate any distraction from the core mission of the Foundation, to help kids acquire musical instruments and participate in music programs.
It wasn’t because I was afraid of the attacks. I’ve been fighting for conservative values for some time now, so I’m not surprised when I’m personally attacked.
But I am reminded of the surprising level of absolute intolerance from the left in our country – an intolerance directed towards every day Americans who believe differently than they do.
The real concern is that this intolerance is now being legislated and argued in our courts...it is an entirely new battle.
We have numerous cases where liberal judges are ruling on “intolerance.”
Jack Phillips, a Colorado Baker, refused to bake a wedding cake for a same-sex couple in 2012 because of his religious beliefs. A judge ruled against his first amendment rights and today his case awaits a decision from the Supreme Court.
The U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit recently declared unconstitutional the historic Bladensburg World War I Veterans Memorial, which has stood since 1925 in honor of 49 Bladensburg-area men who died during WWI. Why? Because the memorial is shaped like a cross.
And forced “inclusion,” at the expense of religious liberty, is being introduced by state legislatures.
The California state legislature recently introduced a new bill (AB2943) that mandates acceptance of lesbian, gay bisexual, and transgender behavior to be a matter of science. This bill would actually make it illegal to counsel or help those with unwanted same-sex attractions.
There are no exemptions for churches, religious non-profits, pastors, or teachers. In fact, as it is currently written, the legislation enforces absolute inclusion on “goods and services” which could include the sale of books sold in California that encourage people to trust in Jesus Christ and the power of the Gospel to heal their sexual brokenness or same-sex attraction.
This is no longer about “tolerance.” It’s truly about the left’s intolerance of any beliefs that are contrary to their own.
But hate doesn't have to win. As Christians, we should not stand for judges who make rulings or elected leaders who pass legislation that strip us of our right to religious freedom.
If Christians stay silent, the left’s intolerance will rob us of our ability to share the truth of the gospel.
That’s why we must elect leaders who will not cave to the pressure. We need elected leaders who will stand for religious liberty by the judges they appoint and the legislation they pass.
This is what is at stake in the midterm elections this year.
On the federal level, there are 149 judicial vacancies out of 890 judicial positions. The Senate has confirmed only 29 of President Trump’s judicial nominees, which means if we don’t elect Senators who believe in religious liberty, then we have no hope of seeing good judges in our federal courts.
It’s estimated that of the 870 judicial positions, 438 judges could vacate their seats because of their senior status eligibility by the year 2020.
This means that President Trump and the Senate, **who we will elect this fall** , could possibly appoint 50.3% of lifetime appointments in Trump’s first term!
This is huge for religious liberty. It will be game-changing one way or the other. We’re already seeing extremely tight Senate Races across the country.
[Peter, I’m counting on you to help us get more like-minded Christians to the polls.](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p180405apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180412apl01nd&n=1)
Together we can elect Senators and leaders who believe in religious liberty and we can see decisions reversed – if millions of Christians simply vote.
We must reach more like-minded Christians to vote this fall. We can’t do this without your financial support. I’m asking you to stand up against the powerful force that is seeking to strip us of religious freedom in the false name of tolerance.
[](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p180405apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180412apl01nd&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180412apl01nd&n=3)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: We're not stopping until we get change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:

---

| | For years, I've pleaded with many lawmakers in the Republican Party to shake themselves free of the gun lobby's grip and pass common-sense gun safety laws. In the wake of successive, senseless gun violence tragedies, my fellow Democrats and I fought for an assault weapons ban, universal background checks, and a ban on bump stocks. Republicans have blocked our efforts. They remain stubbornly resistant and unfailingly loyal to the gun lobby. That includes my opponent, Congressman Jim Renacci, who the NRA just endorsed this week. **But now more than ever, I have hope that things will change.** These young adults are mobilizing this generation and the next. They are calling out politicians' hypocrisy and self-interest -- and millions of Americans are following their lead. [**_We can 't stop until we break the gun lobby's stranglehold over too many lawmakers. Add your name and pledge to fight for common-sense gun safety laws until they are passed._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffbb1/4462dc26/40162fcd/200038cb/1121647053/VEsH/ "http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/e180412") Congress hasn't done its job. By refusing to compromise on even the most modest gun safety reforms, we've failed to protect Americans in the streets, at their places of worship, and in schools. It's unacceptable. I believe in the right to bear arms, but no one should be able to buy a weapon designed for the battlefield without so much as a background check. If you're sick and tired of lawmakers who would rather keep the status quo than cross the gun lobby, you need to stay in this fight until we get the change we've been demanding. [**_Show that you 're not settling for anything less than comprehensive gun safety legislation. Add your name now._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffbb1/4462dc26/40162fcd/200038cb/1121647053/VEsE/ "http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/e180412") With gratitude, Sherrod

body:
Can Democrats take back Congress in 2018? -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1353/3e0906/6275e681/3e34baec/2286361930/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [Can Democrats take back Congress in 2018?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1353/3e0906/6275e681/3e34bae3/2286361930/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Can-Democrats-Win?source=20180412_1_POLL_TEAM_Victory-Poll") That's the question being asked all over the country as we head towards November. And here in Virginia, we're optimistic. Just six months ago, we watched as Democrats picked up 15 seats - way beyond even the most hopeful projections.

Generic matchups by pollsters are showing Democrats with leads over Republicans in all types of districts and in vastly different regions around the country. But still, the effort to regain a majority in both the House and Senate is an uphill battle. Democrats need to win *28 races* in November to take the majority in the Senate, [and a large part of that is making sure we don't lose any of the critical Senate seats we currently have.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1353/3e0906/6275e681/3e34bae3/2286361930/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Can-Democrats-Win?source=20180412_1_POLL_TEAM_Victory-Poll")

**But we believe in the blue wave and the amazing supporters (that 's you!) who are going to make big wins on [November 6th](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1353/3e0906/6275e681/3e34bae3/2286361930/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Can-Democrats-Win?source=20180412_1_POLL_TEAM_Victory-Poll") possible. [So if you think that the Democratic momentum we started in Virginia last fall is the real deal and will continue through 2018, let us know by taking our quick poll here >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1353/3e0906/6275e681/3e34bae3/2286361930/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Can-Democrats-Win?source=20180412_1_POLL_TEAM_Victory-Poll")**

It's not just the Senate - taking back the House will be a major battle, too, with Democrats needing 24 pickups. The good news is that voters in key battleground areas are fed up with Trump's antics and his far-right agenda permeating Washington.

If we protect our most important, vulnerable seats while supporting campaigns that are smart, forward-thinking, and people-driven, Democrats can take back both the Senate and the House in November.

[Do you agree? Is the blue wave is real - and is 2018 going to be a victorious, majority-deciding year for Democrats? Click here to let us know >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1353/3e0906/6275e681/3e34bae3/2286361930/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Can-Democrats-Win?source=20180412_1_POLL_TEAM_Victory-Poll")

Excited to see what you think!

_Team Kaine_
